blocks.text: Match preview: Ireland face India in 1st T20I (T20) on Fri, 26 Jun, 2026, 6:00 pm at Civil Service Cricket Club Belfast. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 26°C / Low 18°C · Rain: 0.1 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
